brand.name: Bluethumb Technologies
brand.tagline: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.

hero.headline: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.
hero.lede: Bluethumb builds products that help businesses grow with their communities, and help investors understand markets with clearer, explainable intelligence.

about.title: Products designed for real people and real progress.
about.body: We create modern financial experiences that turn everyday activity into shared value — for local businesses, the customers they serve, and investors who want to understand markets with confidence.

focus.title: Community-centered loyalty
focus.body: Helping businesses and neighborhoods grow together through smarter loyalty technology.

focus.title: Explainable market intelligence
focus.body: Giving self-directed investors clearer insight into why a market opportunity looks attractive.

products.title: Two products. One purpose: better decisions.
products.body: Blueprint helps retailers and communities grow together. Trading Intelligence helps investors see the market more clearly — with reasoning they can trust.

blueprint.title: Reward customers. Support communities. Create impact.
paragraphs: Blueprint is a loyalty platform that helps retailers attract and keep customers while creating meaningful impact in the communities they serve.
Instead of loyalty that only tracks transactions, Blueprint connects businesses, shoppers, and local outcomes in one shared experience.

consumers.title: For Consumers
points: Enjoy a simple mobile loyalty experience
Earn rewards with the businesses you already love

highlights.title: Loyalty that strengthens local businesses and the communities around them.

items.title: Retailer growth
items.copy: Help businesses attract new customers and earn more repeat visits through shared rewards.

items.title: Member rewards
items.copy: Give shoppers a loyalty experience that feels useful — clear, mobile, and worth coming back for.

items.title: Community impact
items.copy: Connect everyday purchases to outcomes that matter where people live and shop.

items.title: Shared value loop
items.copy: Shop local, unlock rewards, and reinforce the relationship between merchants and members.

trading.title: Clearer market insight for self-directed investors.
trading.lede: Bluethumb helps you understand what the market is saying before you act. It watches live prices, reads the news, scores every symbol through multiple intelligence layers, and explains its thinking in plain English.
trading.paperFirst: You start in paper mode by default — full dashboard, alerts, forecasts, and simulated fills — so you can explore the experience safely before connecting any real capital.
trading.committee: Instead of one opaque score, Bluethumb works like a desk of specialists. Technicals, news, forecasts, risk, portfolio, and market memory each weigh in. When they agree, confidence rises. When they conflict, confidence falls — and you can see why.

ideal: Self-directed investors who want clearer decision support
Traders who care about why an opportunity looks attractive
Anyone evaluating AI-assisted investing with transparency first
notFor: Fully hands-off live trading without oversight
Replacing personalized advice from a licensed professional

why.title: News into clear signals
why.copy: Important headlines are scored and linked to the symbols you follow, so context stays close to action.

why.title: Multi-layer confidence
why.copy: Ideas are stronger when independent systems agree — not when a single black-box score says so.

why.title: Specialist perspectives
why.copy: Risk, portfolio, news, memory, and forecast views come together before a recommendation is sized.

why.title: Plain-English reasoning
why.copy: Every insight and simulated fill comes with language you can actually use.

why.title: Validated forecasts
why.copy: Forward-looking paths are checked against real history — across short and longer horizons.

why.title: Paper-first safety
why.copy: Explore the full experience with simulated fills before any live connection.

why.title: Multi-currency portfolios
why.copy: Canadian, U.S., and crypto holdings each keep their own wallet, positions, and performance view.

why.title: You stay in control
why.copy: Bluethumb recommends. You decide. Alerts and reasoning are decision support — not autopilot.

pipeline.title: How information becomes clarity
pipeline.subtitle: From market noise to an explainable, paper-first recommendation.

stackIntro.title: Many perspectives. One coherent story.
stackIntro.body: Each layer sharpens the picture. Agreement raises confidence. Disagreement lowers it. The result is one clear view per symbol — not a pile of conflicting scores.

dataStack.name: Chart & regime
dataStack.copy: Trend, momentum, and market conditions — so you know whether a symbol looks healthy or unsettled.

dataStack.name: News & alerts
dataStack.copy: Headlines and events scored to symbols, with clear severity and source context.

dataStack.name: Forward outlook
dataStack.copy: Validated paths and probabilities that help you see what may come next.

dataStack.name: Specialist council
dataStack.copy: Portfolio, risk, relationships, memory, and narrative views contribute before sizing.

dataStack.name: Confidence fusion
dataStack.copy: Evidence is combined into one explainable confidence view — including what disagrees.

dataStack.name: Safety & paper mode
dataStack.copy: Guardrails, pause controls, and simulated execution by default until you choose otherwise.

features.title: Intelligence workspace
features.copy: News, forecasts, relationships, and live context in one calm place.

features.title: Live reasoning
features.copy: See what the system is considering, symbol by symbol.

features.title: Explainable history
features.copy: Review activity with plain-English context beside performance.

features.title: Clear portfolio views
features.copy: Separate books for Canadian, U.S., and crypto holdings.

features.title: Built-in safety
features.copy: Pause, stop, and defensive modes when conditions look unstable.

features.title: Paper-first by design
features.copy: Practice and evaluate safely before any live connection.

trading.heroImageAlt: Bluethumb Trading Intelligence portfolio command center

gallery.title: The views you’ll use every day.
gallery.body: Portfolio health, forecasts, alerts, trade history, and decision review — all inside Bluethumb Trading Intelligence.

items.title: Portfolio command center
items.copy: See cash, holdings, and session performance across your books in one calm overview.

items.title: Forecast cards
items.copy: Review outlooks with confidence, expected move, and a clear forward path.

items.title: Intelligence alerts
items.copy: Stay close to ranked market and news signals tied to the symbols you follow.

items.title: Explainable activity log
items.copy: Every simulated fill includes size, result, and the reason behind the action.

items.title: Decision report
items.copy: Understand confidence, key factors, and how perspectives came together.

items.title: Session performance
items.copy: Track progress, activity, and outcomes at a glance throughout the day.

reviewFlow.title: Review the recommendation before you act.
reviewFlow.body: See the fused outlook, how each perspective voted, and the final buy, sell, or wait guidance — with a suggested size.

steps.label: 01 · Consensus
steps.title: Fused outlook
steps.copy: Rating, confidence, odds, and a clear final recommendation with an optimal ticket.

steps.label: 02 · Perspectives
steps.title: How each view contributed
steps.copy: Technical, news, alerts, profile, memory, and forecast perspectives each share their vote.

steps.label: 03 · Policy & risk
steps.title: From evidence to decision
steps.copy: Validation, scenarios, and risk guardrails shape the final buy, sell, or wait policy.

mission.title: Technology should empower people.
mission.body: Bluethumb builds products that simplify complexity and create meaningful impact. Blueprint helps communities and businesses grow together. Trading Intelligence helps investors understand markets with greater clarity.
mission.statement: Build technology that helps people make better decisions.

footer.title: Let’s talk about your next step.
footer.note: Financial technology that connects communities and empowers smarter decisions.
